title: impatiens aliciae var. aliciae
intro: Impatiens aliciae var. aliciae, also known as the New Caledonian balsam, is a species of flowering plant in the balsam family. It has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits. The herbal preparations of Impatiens aliciae var. aliciae include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
